listing.short_description: See what is putting pressure on your computer and which workloads are responsible.
listing.description: BatCave Monitor is a local resource monitor for technical users. It shows CPU, memory, disk, and network pressure, ranks the workloads behind it, and explains when a measurement is estimated or unavailable. Detailed process evidence stays available in Explore without crowding the overview. BatCave keeps monitoring data on your computer and has no analytics, telemetry upload, account, or remote logging.
features: Stable live workload ranking and inspection
CPU, memory, disk, and network trends
Local-only data and optional local explanations
